subcategory: macOS-style app dock with icon launcher
use_cases: Primary navigation dock for applications mimicking macOS desktop experience
App launcher with theme toggle functionality (light/dark mode)
Quick access icon menu for web applications with hover animations
ai_summary: A faithful macOS-style dock navigation component featuring app icons with smooth hover animations powered by Framer Motion. Includes theme switching capability with sun/moon icons, glass-morphism styling, and a responsive icon grid layout. Perfect for creating a familiar macOS-inspired navigation experience in web applications.
